data.author: welwordion-sys
data.description: A novel AI architecture where traversal of data representation space is the primary computational mechanism. The system explicitly navigates transformations of problem representations until recognisable patterns emerge, rather than treating representation learning as a byproduct of optimisation.

project_info.notes: Started April 28 2026. Core idea: instead of find the answer, find the representation in which the answer becomes obvious.

global_tags.notes: Shared tags used across chunks for cross-referencing.

sources.title: Kolmogorov Complexity
sources.relevance: Shortest description of data — related to compression criterion for library entries

sources.title: Solomonoff Induction
sources.relevance: Searching over programs — related to traversal over rule space

sources.title: Weisfeiler-Leman Graph Isomorphism Algorithm
sources.relevance: Approximate graph similarity — alternative to exact GI for pattern recognition

sources.title: Graph Neural Networks
sources.relevance: Fuzzy pattern matching over graphs without solving GI explicitly

sources.title: Minimum Description Length (MDL) Principle
sources.relevance: Candidate compression criterion for when a subgraph earns library entry

sources.title: Cognitive Chunking Theory
sources.relevance: Compressing repeated patterns into single units — analogous to translator/library mechanism

sources.title: Category Theory
sources.relevance: Structure-preserving transformations — relevant to translation operations

findings.summary: Most data structures reduce to directed graphs + traversal rules.
Problem difficulty is often a function of representation, not inherent complexity.
Graph isomorphism is not known to be in P, but approximate similarity may suffice.
Rule space bloat is the lesser evil compared to data space bloat.
Library entries must be rule-invariant pairs, not subgraphs alone.
Frequency alone does not earn library entry — must correlate with labels.

questions.question: What defines the topology of representation space?
What compression criterion governs library entry?
How does the data system decide which invariants to retain?
How does the rewrite system evolve itself?
Should genetic operations be fixed primitives or evolvable graph rewrites?
Is exact GI needed or is approximate similarity sufficient?

data.approach: Theoretical architecture design through iterative conversation.
constraints: GI computational cost is a known concern
Unbounded parameter growth is a known concern

terms.definition: Logic-derived layer, unlocked after human approval.
Cascade of partial matches climbing layers.
